name: The Birdie Barn
about: The Birdie Barn is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Bellingham, MA, offering a climate-controlled space for golf practice and play year-round. The facility features five simulator bays equipped with aboutGOLF technology to monitor swing speed, distance, and provide detailed player analytics. Membership options include one hour of daily simulator time per month, with the ability to book up to 30 days in advance. Guests can also book time at an hourly rate of $50 per bay, with flexible options for groups and corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art aboutGOLF simulators with accurate swing data tracking
Convenient indoor practice accessible year-round, regardless of weather
Flexible membership plan offering daily access for consistent practice
